root_text.sn38.9:1.3: “Yaṁ kho, āvuso, dukkhe aññāṇaṁ, dukkhasamudaye aññāṇaṁ, dukkhanirodhe aññāṇaṁ, dukkhanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya aññāṇaṁ—
root_text.sn38.9:1.5: “Atthi panāvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etissā avijjāya pahānāyā”ti?
root_text.sn38.9:1.6: “Atthi kho, āvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā, etissā avijjāya pahānāyā”ti.
root_text.sn38.9:1.7: “Katamo panāvuso, maggo katamā paṭipadā, etissā avijjāya pahānāyā”ti?
root_text.sn38.9:1.8: “Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo, etissā avijjāya pahānāya, seyyathidaṁ—
root_text.sn38.9:1.10: Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, maggo ayaṁ paṭipadā, etissā avijjāya pahānāyā”ti.
root_text.sn38.9:1.11: “Bhaddako, āvuso, maggo bhaddikā paṭipadā, etissā avijjāya pahānāya.

translation_text.sn38.9:1.1: “Reverend Sāriputta, they speak of this thing called ‘ignorance’.
translation_text.sn38.9:1.3: “Not knowing about suffering, the origin of suffering, the cessation of suffering, and the practice that leads to the cessation of suffering.
translation_text.sn38.9:1.5: “But, reverend, is there a path and a practice for giving up that ignorance?”
